audit_items.proof_trace: Signature verification is bypassed when a seen block arrives but the chain head has moved to a different (slot, proposer). The equivocation detector early-returns without calling VerifyProposerSlashing if headBlock slot/proposer doesn't match incoming block, allowing resubmitted blocks with invalid signatures to be ignored unverified.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker sends Block A (valid) at slot N which becomes head and is cached. Chain advances to slot N+1. Attacker resends slot N with same proposer but crafted invalid signature. The seen-cache triggers equivocation check, but head mismatch causes early return at L498-501, bypassing signature verification entirely.
